info.name: Driver Network — UC2-A HMV Truck Recruitment (Full Lifecycle)
info.description:
## Driver Network — UC2-A: HMV Truck Driver Recruitment (Full Lifecycle)

**Scenario:** RoadFreight Logistics (Operator, acting as BAP) discovers and recruits an experienced HMV truck driver from TruckLink Driver Platform. Full evaluation cycle with in-person interview + driving test on highway track.

**Protocol:** Beckn v2.0.0 + DriverCandidateProfileResource v2.1
**BAP:** Operator Platform (RoadFreight Logistics)  |  **BPP:** Driver Platform (TruckLink)
**Category:** driver-candidate  |  **Role:** TRUCK_DRIVER  |  **Employment:** PERMANENT

### PII Audit — Candidate Profiles
The on_discover catalog (folder 02) contains DriverCandidateProfileResource payloads.
VERIFIED SAFE — the following PII fields are explicitly absent:
  ✓ passport_reference: EXCLUDED (x-pii-disclosure-stage: init — appears only at init+)
  ✓ home_location.gps: EXCLUDED (locality-level only per privacy_notes — address_locality,
    address_region, postal_code, address_country only)
  ✓ descriptor.name: ANONYMISED — "Driver Profile D-XXXX" (no real name)
  ✓ reputation_summary / credential_summary / training_summary: NOT PII — included safely

### Role reversal vs UC1
BAP = Operator Platform (initiates recruitment), BPP = Driver Platform (publishes profiles).
The `seeker_np_id` variable should be set to the Operator Platform's network ID.

### Hiring stage progression
APPLICATION_SUBMITTED → INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED → EVALUATION_COMPLETE → OFFER_ISSUED → OFFER_ACCEPTED → HIRING_CONFIRMED → ONBOARDING_COMPLETE

variable.description: Confirm exact value with network registry team
UUID format required by core spec
PII — Driver Passport reference. Disclosed at init and later only.

item.name: 01 — discover
item.description: Operator (BAP) searches candidate profiles. Roles reversed: BAP=Operator, BPP=Driver Platform.

item.name: 02 — on_discover
item.description: BPP returns candidate catalog. ★ PII AUDIT: passport_reference absent; home_location GPS absent; names anonymised.

item.name: 05 — init
item.description: Operator sends recruitment invitation. passport_reference disclosed here (PII gate: init).

item.name: 06 — on_init
item.description: APPLICATION_SUBMITTED — driver platform acknowledges recruitment invitation.

item.name: 13 — confirm
item.description: Operator confirms driver acceptance; contract ACTIVE.
